productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Black Laptop Bag
description: VITALGear is the one stop shop for those who prefer reliable and quality bags. Carry your laptop in style with this Techno Gear bag from VITALGear. With ample space for office accessories as well as your laptop, the bag is best suited for office and general heavy duty use. Length: 40 cm Made of 1680 D polyester A flap covering the main compartments with a magnetic button closure Two main compartments with a button closure Side strap for easy handling Padded laptop compartment, organiser pouches and a zippered pocket in the first main compartmentA second compartment for storage A small zippered compartment on the upper flap with printed branding for carrying small items A concealed zippered compartment on the back with an id card holder Padded aircore back system Care Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring
